sections.paragraph: Job 9:18, a doubtful form which appears to have sprung from מַמְרֹרִים (36 copies read מַמְרוּרִים), and מִמְרֹרִים from מְרֹרִים bitternesses, with מִן prefixed. The construction will bear either, since the verb שָׂבַע admits either construction, an accusative, or the particle מִן.
